title: Patch Tuesday, February 2026 Edition
desc: Microsoft today released updates to fix more than 50 security holes in its Windows operating systems and other software, including patches for a whopping six "zero-day" vulnerabilities that attackers are already exploiting in the wild.

title: Please Don’t Feed the Scattered Lapsus ShinyHunters

title: Patch Tuesday, January 2026 Edition
desc: Microsoft today issued patches to plug at least 113 security holes in its various Windows operating systems and supported software. Eight of the vulnerabilities earned Microsoft's most-dire "critical" rating, and the company warns that attackers are already exploiting one of the bugs fixed today.
